blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
